channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: China and U.S. reach preliminary agreement to ease agricultural trade restrictions
item.description: Following a recent summit in Beijing between U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping, China and the United States have agreed to expand agricultural trade through a combination of...

item.title: Venezuela Deports Maduro Ally Alex Saab to the U.S. Amid Ongoing Investigations
item.description: On May 16, 2026, the Venezuelan government announced the deportation of Alex Saab, a close ally of former President Nicolas Maduro, to the United States where he faces multiple criminal investigations...

item.title: Major News Highlights in Nigeria Today, 17th May 2026
item.description: Good morning, Naija! Today, we dey bring una top gist from across Nigeria. First, the Presidency don clear matter wey say ISIS commander Abu-Bilal Al-Manuki die for 2024. Bayo Onanuga talk say na case...

item.title: A Retrospective on André Wilquin's Influence in 20th Century French Graphic Design
item.description: André Wilquin (1899-2000) was a French graphic artist whose innovative work significantly shaped advertising and publishing during the first half of the 20th century. Known for his remarkable versatil...

item.title: Shakira and Burna Boy release official 2026 FIFA World Cup anthem 'Dai Dai'
item.description: Global music stars Shakira and Burna Boy have teamed up to release the official song for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, titled 'Dai Dai.' The track marks a major collaboration between two internationally ac...

item.title: UK Government Explores Northern England Hosting Olympics and Paralympics in the 2040s
item.description: The UK government has asked UK Sport to conduct an initial strategic assessment into the possibility of a northern England bid to host the Olympics and Paralympics in the 2040s. The study will evaluat...

item.title: The Art of Frédéric Soulacroix: Capturing Belle Époque Elegance
item.description: Frédéric Soulacroix (1858–1933) was a celebrated French-Italian painter recognized for his exceptional skill in depicting the refined life of European high society during the late Victorian era and ea...

item.title: Analysis of Labor’s CGT changes and their impact on business investment and personal wealth
item.description: Following the recent federal budget, much attention has centred on the removal of the capital gains tax (CGT) discount for property investors, framed as a move to improve intergenerational equality. H...

item.title: UK National Careers Service offers online tarot reading courses for job seekers
item.description: The UK's National Careers Service (NCS), managed by the Department of Work and Pensions (DWP), has introduced short online courses in tarot card reading for job seekers. The ten-hour course aims to pr...

item.title: Lagos Gears Up to Host 2026 WTT Contender Table Tennis Tournament
item.description: Chairman of the Local Organising Committee for the 2026 WTT Contender Lagos, Adesoji Tayo, don promise sey the tournament go bring correct experience for both players and fans from May 19 to 24 at Mol...

item.title: Senate Locked Down During Shooting Incident Involving Senator Dela Rosa
item.description: On May 13, 2026, the Senate of the Philippines experienced a major security incident when gunshots were fired inside the building, leading to a temporary lockdown. The incident occurred after Senator ...

item.title: Behind the Scenes of The Beatles’ Abbey Road Album Sessions in 1969
item.description: The 1969 recording sessions for The Beatles’ Abbey Road album marked the final time all four members—John Lennon, Paul McCartney, George Harrison, and Ringo Starr—worked together in the studio. After ...

item.title: Starmer’s Leadership Challenges Reflect Broader Frustration with Centrist Politics
item.description: Keir Starmer, the UK’s sixth prime minister in ten years, faces criticism for cautious leadership and failing to address pressing domestic issues. His approach, aimed at stability after years of polit...

item.title: Jong Uichico Notes TNT's Stronger Lineup Overpowers NLEX Youth Squad
item.description: During a recent PBA game, veteran coach Jong Uichico highlighted the performance gap between TNT Tropang 5G and the younger NLEX Road Warriors. According to Uichico, TNT’s squad, packed with experienc...

item.title: Former Trump Lawyer Criticizes Trump's IRS Lawsuit and $1.7 Billion Fund Plan
item.description: Former President Donald Trump's legal strategies involving the IRS have drawn sharp criticism from his own former attorney, Ty Cobb. Trump had filed a $10 billion lawsuit against the IRS, which he ove...

item.title: Dutch Citizen Missing in Mombasa, Family Seeks Help in Kenya
item.description: A Dutch citizen named Sheikh Mahfuzur Rahman Emon, originally from Bangladesh, has gone missing while on holiday in Kenya. Emon arrived in Mombasa on 11th April 2026 and was sharing updates from his t...

item.title: Kirinyaga Woman Murdered in Nairobi After Troubled Relationship
item.description: Nairobi – Ann Keya, a woman originally from Kirinyaga, was allegedly murdered by her boyfriend in Kilimani on May 14, shortly after returning to work following her resignation. Her mother, Julia Wanji...

item.title: Amazon Ends Support for Older Kindles; Users Explore Alternatives
item.description: As of May 16, 2026, Amazon has officially ended support for all first- and second-generation Kindle devices, including Kindle Fire tablets, the Kindle Touch, and the 9.7-inch Kindle DX, along with any...

item.title: Kaduna APC Chairman Abducted by Youths After Controversial House of Reps Primary
item.description: For Igabi Local Government Area, Kaduna State, wahala burst Saturday as angry youths carry the APC chairman, Bashir Jibrin Jaji, following disagreement over the House of Representatives primary for Ig...

item.title: Key Developments in the Legal Dispute Between Elon Musk and Sam Altman Over OpenAI
item.description: A federal trial in Oakland, California, has brought to light the bitter legal feud between Elon Musk and Sam Altman regarding OpenAI. Musk has accused Altman, OpenAI, and its president, Greg Brockman,...
